column8: Ordinary ships have trouble travelling through the Atlantic Ocean.
column9: The Yamal uses nuclear energy to melt ice in its path.
column10: The materials the ship is built of help it travel through the Atlantic Ocean.
column11: The Nenets sometimes travel using the Yamal.
column12: The Yamal was built to help other ships travel through the Arctic.
column13: The only ship to travel to the North Pole in the year 2000 was the Yamal.
column14: The Yamal carried a total of 18 Arctic explorers during its 2009 travels.
column15: The picture of the mouth is there to make people feel scared.
